principles: Provider credentials live only in Base44 Dashboard Secrets.
Use published HTTPS Base44 function URLs, never localhost or the Base44 editor preview URL.
A channel is connected only after provider send/API readiness and real inbound webhook evidence both exist.
AI is draft-only; every outbound send must use an approved AiDraft.

global_gates.label: Confirm Base44 Builder plan or higher
global_gates.evidence: Backend functions and external APIs are available in the Base44 app.

global_gates.label: Run npm run check before publish
global_gates.evidence: Lint, typecheck, generated functions, preflight, fixture, flow, and build checks pass.

global_gates.label: Publish current branch to Base44
global_gates.evidence: Published app opens and the Omnichannel Setup page is visible to an admin.

global_gates.label: Configure local .env.local with the published function base

channels.label: Email / Postmark
provider_setup: Create or choose a Postmark Server.
Add the generated Email webhook URL and append ?secret=<POSTMARK_INBOUND_WEBHOOK_SECRET>.
Forward the support inbox to the Postmark inbound address if using forwarding.
connector_test: Enter a real test recipient email.
Confirm the Email card becomes Send ready, not Connected yet unless inbound has already arrived.
inbound_test: Send a real email into Postmark inbound.
Confirm a Ticket, ConversationMessage, channel_message timeline entry, and AiDraft are created.
Confirm Email card reaches Connected after send readiness plus inbound evidence.
outbound_test: Edit the AI draft if needed.
Confirm Postmark sends the email and the ticket timeline shows send_attempt with send_status=sent.

channels.label: Facebook Messenger
provider_setup: Connect the Meta app to the target Facebook Page.
Set the generated Facebook callback URL in Meta Webhooks.
Use META_VERIFY_TOKEN as the webhook verification token.
Subscribe the Page to message events.
connector_test: Run Test connector for Facebook Messenger.
Confirm the Facebook card becomes Send ready until a real inbound message arrives.
inbound_test: Send a real Page message to the business Page.
Confirm a Ticket, ConversationMessage, channel_message timeline entry, and AiDraft are created.
Confirm Facebook card reaches Connected after send readiness plus inbound evidence.
outbound_test: Approve + Send from the AI draft panel.
Confirm Meta sends the reply and the ticket timeline shows send_attempt with send_status=sent.

channels.label: Instagram Messaging
provider_setup: Use an Instagram professional account connected to the Meta app/Page.
Set the generated Instagram callback URL in Meta Webhooks.
Use META_VERIFY_TOKEN as the webhook verification token.
connector_test: Confirm Meta credential lookup passes for META_INSTAGRAM_ACCOUNT_ID.
Confirm the Instagram card becomes Send ready until a real inbound message arrives.
inbound_test: Send a real Instagram DM to the business account.
Confirm a Ticket, ConversationMessage, channel_message timeline entry, and AiDraft are created.
Confirm the ticket preserves channel_type=instagram and shows the Instagram badge.
outbound_test: Approve + Send from the AI draft panel.
Confirm the reply sends through the Instagram account node and the ticket timeline shows send_attempt with send_status=sent.

channels.label: WhatsApp Cloud API
provider_setup: Configure the WhatsApp Cloud API phone number.
Set the generated WhatsApp callback URL in Meta/WhatsApp Webhooks.
Use WHATSAPP_VERIFY_TOKEN as the webhook verification token.
connector_test: Confirm the WhatsApp card becomes Send ready until a real inbound message arrives.
inbound_test: Send a real WhatsApp message to the business number.
Confirm a Ticket, ConversationMessage, channel_message timeline entry, and AiDraft are created.
Confirm WhatsApp card reaches Connected after send readiness plus inbound evidence.
outbound_test: Reply inside the 24-hour service window and confirm send_status=sent.
For outside-window replies, enter an approved template name/language code.
Confirm free-form outside-window sends are blocked with send_status=blocked.

negative_tests.label: Supplier/partner users cannot access ticket/customer channel cockpit
negative_tests.expected: No Omnichannel Setup nav and backend draft/send/setup functions return 403

negative_tests.label: Direct body-only sends are rejected
negative_tests.expected: Backend send function returns an error requiring approved ai_draft_id
